---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with compose-stylus
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**Description**
A clear and concise description of the bug.

**Affected target(s)**
- [ ] Desktop (JVM)
- [ ] Android
- [ ] iOS
- [ ] Web (wasmJs)

**Affected module(s)**
- [ ] `stylus`
- [ ] `stylus-compose`
- [ ] `stylus-jni`

**Reproduction steps**
1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

**Expected behavior**
What you expected to happen.

**Actual behavior**
What actually happened (include the full stack trace, logs, or screenshots when relevant).

**Minimal reproducible sample**
A code snippet or a link to a small repository that reproduces the issue.

```kotlin
// minimal repro
```

**Environment**
- compose-stylus version: <!-- e.g. 0.5.0 -->
- Kotlin version: <!-- e.g. 2.2.21 -->
- Compose Multiplatform version: <!-- e.g. 1.9.3 -->
- Gradle version: <!-- e.g. 8.13 -->
- JDK: <!-- e.g. Temurin 17 -->
- OS / device: <!-- e.g. macOS 14.5 (M2), Pixel 7 (Android 14), iPad Pro 11" (iPadOS 17), Chrome 124 -->
- Stylus / pen: <!-- e.g. Apple Pencil (2nd gen), Wacom Intuos Pro, Surface Pen, S Pen -->

**Additional context**
Anything else that might help — related issues, recent changes, workarounds you've tried.
